subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-09 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Just as the birds and other beasts think, from the break of day, only of seeds and prey, so too is it with these people
subcodes.first_line_orig: چنانچه طیور و وحوش از صبح بفکر دانه و طعمه‌أند همین طور این مردم متصل در خیال
subcodes.subjects: @critique of Western values; culture, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @attaining the life of the spirit, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit
